feature_contract.depth: last official depth snapshot whose timestamp is <= completed five-minute close
feature_contract.metrics: official five-minute observation delayed by one additional completed five-minute bar
feature_contract.aggTrades: only transaction timestamps inside the completed half-open five-minute interval
feature_contract.one_minute_features: only completed one-minute closes at or before five-minute close
feature_contract.flow_toxicity: rolling 50 completed five-minute bars; no future volume buckets
feature_contract.decayed_intensity: causal EWM of completed five-minute buyer/seller aggregate-trade row counts

required_audits: all downloaded ZIPs match adjacent official CHECKSUM
aggTrades quote and taker-buy quote reconcile to official klines
depth snapshots never occur after the feature availability time
metrics source time plus one full bar never exceeds feature availability time
prefix invariance: removing every raw row after 12:00 UTC cannot change any feature available before 12:00 UTC
